content: Hallo. Vorbereitete Hilfeartikel in Ihrer Sprache finden Sie unter dem Link „Hilfeartikel“ oben auf dieser Seite. Freiwillige, die Ihre Sprache fließend beherrschen, beantworten Ihre Fragen jedoch auf einer anderen Website. Wenn Englisch also nicht Ihre bevorzugte Sprache ist, stellen Sie Ihre Fragen am besten auf der folgenden Website. ... Thunderbird-mail.de - http://www.thunderbird-mail.de/wiki/Hauptseite oder Hilfe - https://support.mozilla.org/de/kb/hilfe-durch-unsere-gemeinschaft-erhalten?exit_aaq=1
creator: siffemoz

content:
Another place where passwords or logon tokens can be cached is in a cookie. Try combing through Thunderbird's saved cookies and delete any that reference Hushmail.

They can be found (in Windows) at <Tools | Settings | Privacy & Security | Web Content | "Show Cookies" button>.
creator: rednoise

content: I checked with Northmail.ca, and they do restrict recipients to 25 [so much for Brave's AI], however they will review and possibly increase. Using mailing list does not work with Northmail,ca, as Thunderbird breaks them out, thus surpassing the threshold. Work around is to split mailing lists into groups of 25 or less.
creator: sibedad

content:
I suggest installing over the old one, assuming both versions came from thunderbird.net. To be totally safe (assuming Windows), you could do this to backup the profile:


  1. ensure thunderbird is not running
  2. enter %appdata% in search window on task bar and press Enter key
  3. this should open windows file explorer in Appdata\roaming folder
  4. highlight the Thunderbird folder and copy to external media
creator: davidsk
